[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01000011 3
1 00101101 4
2 00100000 1
3 01110100 4
4 11101100 5
5 11001000 3
6 00101100 3
7 00110000 2

01 10 00100000 1 match 2
12 21 00000000 a
23 32 01000001 2
34 43 00100000 1 match 2
45 54 00101100 3 match 6
56 65 01101100 4
67 76 11001000 3 match 5
70 07 00001000 1

02 20 00000000 a
13 31 00110000 2 match 7
24 42 00000000 a
35 53 01110000 3
46 64 00101100 3 match 6
57 75 01001000 2
60 06 00101100 3 match 6
71 17 00000000 a

03 30 00100000 1 match 2
14 41 00100000 1 match 2
25 52 01000000 1
36 63 01100000 2
47 74 00001000 1
50 05 00101100 3 match 6
61 16 00100000 1 match 2
72 27 01000000 1

04 40 00101100 3 match 6
15 51 00110000 2 match 7
26 62 01000000 1
37 73 01000000 1
